name: Spicy Marinated Shrimp and Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine olive oil, paprika, cayenne pepper, tabasco sauce, salt, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl.
2. Peel and chop the garlic cloves into small pieces.
3. Add the garlic to the mixture and stir well.
4. Place the shrimp in a shallow dish or resealable bag with the garlic mixture. Ensure each shrimp is coated evenly.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes, up to several hours for more flavor infusion.
6. Before serving, remove the shrimp from the marinade and discard any remaining liquid.
7. Serve the marinated shrimp garnished with fresh parsley.
